Methods

breedMatchesCountry(breed, country) → {boolean}

Checks to make sure breed matches selected country

Name Type Description
breed object Breed object
country object Country object

(async) fetchDogBreeds() → {Promise.<Array.<object>>}

Fetches all dog breeds from dog API Caches result so app doesnt request list repeatedly

  • api.js, line 98
Returns:
List of dog breeds

Promise.<Array.<object>>

(async) getCountryAndBreeds(countryCode, countryNameopt) → {Promise.<{country: object, breeds: Array.<object>}>}

Gets country data and dog breeds that match Uses country name as a fallback in case country code is missing or invalid
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Default Description
countryCode string Country code
countryName string <optional>
 '' Country name fallback
Source:
  • api.js, line 153
Returns:
Matched data
Type
Promise.<{country: object, breeds: Array.<object>}>
